[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011001001 5
1 0110100011 5
2 1111101100 7
3 1010111000 5
4 1110100101 6
5 0110000000 2
6 0000000000 a
7 0011011000 4

01 10 1111111000 7
12 21 1111111001 8
23 32 1111101011 8
34 43 1111101111 9
45 54 1111111100 8
56 65 1110111101 8
67 76 1110100101 6 match 4
70 07 0111011000 5

13 31 1111111011 9

60 06 1111111101 9

47 74 1111101100 7 match 2
50 05 1011111000 6
61 16 1111111101 9
72 27 1111001001 6

37 73 0110100011 5 match 1
